classes.name: Learning System
classes.description: The infrastructure and technology that supports learning activities.

classes.name: Learning Activity
classes.description: A specific task or project that learners engage in to acquire knowledge or skills.

classes.name: Learning Resource
classes.description: A material, tool, or technology used to support learning activities.

classes.name: Learning Analytics
classes.description: The process of analyzing data from learning activities to inform instruction and improve student outcomes.
